### Applicable Trigger Categories

**Primary category**: `PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL`  
This wave advances MMM from Stage 3 (FRS) → Stage 4 (TRS) in the canonical 12-stage pre-build lifecycle. It creates `modules/MMM/03-trs/` stage artifacts and updates `modules/MMM/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md` with the stage advancement record. Per trigger table row PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL: mandatory.

**Secondary category**: `AAWP_MAT`  
D1 and D2 are MAT module deliverable artifacts. The MMM TRS and traceability matrix are specification deliverables directly feeding the MAT pre-build pipeline.

**Classification**: `MIXED` — both PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL and AAWP_MAT trigger categories are present. The entire PR is subject to IAA mandatory invocation. AMBIGUITY RULE: not required here — classification is unambiguous; both categories are clearly satisfied.

**IAA triggered**: YES — MANDATORY  
**AMBIGUITY**: CLEAR — no ambiguity

### PREHANDOVER Structure Requirements

The PREHANDOVER proof committed to this branch MUST contain evidence for ALL of the following:

| Evidence Item | Required Content | Acceptance Condition |
|---------------|-----------------|---------------------|
| **D1 existence** | `modules/MMM/03-trs/technical-requirements-specification.md` committed | File present, non-empty, non-placeholder |
| **D1 completeness — 7 mandatory questions** | TRS must answer all 7 mandatory technical questions: (1) Performance requirements/SLAs, (2) Integration contracts (MMM↔AIMC, MMM↔PIT, MMM↔KUC), (3) Data persistence (schema, retention, archiving), (4) Security (auth, authz, data isolation, audit logging), (5) Offline/connectivity — OQ-001 DECISION (not deferred), (6) Scalability (multi-org, multi-framework), (7) Infrastructure constraints (Vercel, Supabase, Render) | All 7 answered; zero TBD items permitted |
| **D1 completeness — OQ-001 resolved** | Open Question OQ-001 (offline/walkabout mode connectivity decision) must be explicitly resolved with a named disposition (e.g., "Online-only: offline mode deferred", "Progressive offline: IndexedDB/service worker required", etc.) | OQ-001 disposition clearly named in TRS — not deferred |
| **D1 completeness — quality gate definitions** | Coverage thresholds and acceptance criteria for the build stage must be defined in the TRS | Quality gate section present with quantitative thresholds |
| **D2 existence** | `modules/MMM/03-trs/frs-to-trs-traceability.md` committed | File present, non-empty, non-placeholder |
| **D2 completeness — 80 FR traceability** | ALL 80 FRs from `modules/MMM/02-frs/functional-requirements.md` traced to TRS sections | FR-001 through FR-080 all present; no gaps; traceability matrix explicit |
| **D3 existence** | `modules/MMM/BUILD_PROGRESS_TRACKER.md` updated | File updated on branch |
| **D3 Stage 3 → COMPLETE** | Stage 3 checkbox updated to COMPLETE with CS2 approval reference (issue #1366 or #1372) | Tracker Stage 3 shows COMPLETE + CS2 approval date/reference |
| **D3 Stage 4 → IN_PROGRESS** | Stage 4 checkbox updated to IN_PROGRESS with this wave reference | Tracker Stage 4 shows IN_PROGRESS |
| **D3 OQ-001 disposition** | OQ-001 disposition recorded in tracker (or explicit tracker reference to TRS §OQ-001) | OQ-001 outcome documented |
| **PREHANDOVER iaa_audit_token format** | `iaa_audit_token` field in PREHANDOVER proof pre-populated as expected reference | Value = `IAA-session-NNN-mmm-stage4-trs-20260414-PASS` (not PENDING, per A-029) |
| **Session memory** | Session memory artifact committed at `.agent-workspace/*/memory/session-NNN-YYYYMMDD.md` | File present using 6-field template |
| **Wave record — PRE-BRIEF section** | This wave record with PRE-BRIEF section committed before builder work begins | This file committed (confirmed: 2026-04-14) |

2. **CORE-020** (zero partial pass): All evidence must be present and substantive — not placeholder or stub content

3. **CORE-021** (zero-severity tolerance): Any finding triggers REJECTION-PACKAGE regardless of perceived size

4. **A-001**: PREHANDOVER proof must reference IAA invocation

5. **A-029**: PREHANDOVER `iaa_audit_token` in expected reference format

6. **OVL-INJ-001**: Pre-Brief artifact present before builder task artifacts (this file — satisfied)
